description.short: In addition to the standard of Indonesia Care, all guests get free Wi-Fi in all rooms and free parking if arriving by car. Strategically situated in Banda Aceh, allowing you access and proximity to local attractions and sights. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  Massage, restaurant and spa are among the special facilities that will enhance your stay with on-site convenience.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The price offered by Agoda is usually lower, but when I checked at the reception... Why is it cheaper than Agoda...?
comments.originalComment: Harga yg ditawarkan agoda biasanya lebih rendah, pas liat di reception.. Kok lebih murah dari agoda...

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: It was a good stay. The main point that i wanted to highlight here is the cleanliness of the room is beyond my expectation. Overall its value for money that i have spend.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: good hard bed. room and toilet was clean. good hot water shower with moderate water pressure. did not use any soap so can review. the foc toothpaste was leaking in the pastic with toothbrush so didnt use. two hangers provided. bath towel thou was clean was pretty worn out. toto brand toilet which is good. two soft pillows provided. bedsheets had spots of pale yellow stains. there were two middle areas front and back where the blanket was torn. table was clean. good working tv with english channels. ac was good. both remotes were dirty. i booked the accom bcos i wanted the wooden flooring shown in agoda but was given tile flooring. unless management look into the comments, the overall price should be much lowered

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Fine for a night or two in Banda Aceh. Small room, comfortable enough, clean-ish, a/c is fine, WiFi is ok. For the price you pay it’s acceptable.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: kami pesan kamar yg deluxe triple room. kamar yg di foto tidak sama dengan yg di berikan. staffnya blg gak semua kamar seperti itu.  yg positif hanya shower air panasnya yg on terus.

demographics.name: All guests
demographics.reviewProviderLogoText: Real guests. Trusted reviews. Provided by

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel facilities are good, but it's a shame the parking system is unclear. First, I asked the receptionist and they said to pay just once, and when I went out to find something to eat, the parking attendant said to pay just once, and that I didn't need to pay again when checking out the next day, and they gave me a parking ticket. But the next day when checking out, the parking attendant had changed and told me to pay again, saying that since it was a new day, I had to pay again. It's very strange. The parking attendant was a skinny girl, and to enter the parking lot, you had to use an e-toll card, and if you didn't pay again, they wouldn't open the exit gate. So in total, I paid 8,000 for parking. I've never stayed at a hotel where parking costs that much.
comments.originalComment: Fasilitas hotel bagus, cuma sayang bgt sistem parkirnya gak jelas. Pertama tanya resepsionis katanya bayar sekali aja, keluar mau cari makan kata petugas parkir bayar sekali aja besok check out ga usah bayar lagi dan dikasih karcis parkir. Pas besoknya check out eh petugas parkirnya udah ganti dan disuruh bayar lagi, katanya krn udah ganti hari jadi harus bayar lagi. Aneh bgt. Petugas parkirnya cewek kurus, masuk parkir pun pake kartu e-toll, kalo ga bayar lagi ya ga dibuka portal exitnya. Jd total bayar parkir sampek 8ribu. Nggak pernah² nginap d hotel bayar parkir sampek segitu.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel reservation was redirected to their homestay without knowledge, the reason being that it was from Agoda... the service was very poor.. given a room on the 3rd floor with no lift.. the room smelled musty.
comments.originalComment: Pesan hotel dialihkan ke homestaynya mereka tanpa sepengetahuan, alasan nya itu dari agodanya…buruk sekali pelayanan.. dikasi kamar lantai 3 tidak ada lift..kamar bau apek

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Hôtel propre, chambre confortable mais sans fenêtre, douche chaude et satisfaisante, petit déjeuner correct sans plus, café infect, ce qui est surprenant pour la région. Personnel poli et aidant. Pour 500K IRP, je me serais attendu à un peu mieux.

comments.reviewComments: Very clean and neat room. We spent just one night and it was very satisfying. Confortable bed, good and warm shower, good ac, good wifi. Recommended!
